statements.select: SELECT RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID()) AS TRANCODE FROM ACCOUNT WHERE 1=1 AND USER_ID=#USER_ID# AND (USER_PWD=#USER_PWD# OR USER_PWD=#USER_PWD2#)

SELECT T.NAMELIST_ID, T.NAME AS CNAME, '/Share/Photo/ShowAppPhoto' || CHR(63) || 'CODE=' || TO_CHAR((TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(IDNO,-4))+7138)*88) || '&motel=' || REPLACE(MOTEL,'-','') PHOTO, T.TITLE, T.BIRTHDAY, T.IDNO, T.MOTEL as MOBILE, T.EMAIL FROM NAMELIST T WHERE 1=1 /*AND NFC_ID IS NULL*/ AND IDNO=#IDNO# AND BIRTHDAY=#BIRTH#
SELECT A.NAMELIST_ID FROM NAMELIST A WHERE 1=1 AND NFC_ID=#NFC_ID# AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NAMELIST X WHERE X.NAMELIST_ID=#NAMELIST_ID# )

SELECT F.PROF_ID, F.PNAME PROF_NAME, TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') as PDATE, CK.SEQ, CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID as ITEM_ID, CK.ITEM_NAME, CASE WHEN CK.START_TIME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(CK.START_TIME,1,2) || ':' || SUBSTR(CK.START_TIME,3) END START_TIME, CASE WHEN CK.END_TIME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(CK.END_TIME,1,2) || ':' || SUBSTR(CK.END_TIME,3) END END_TIME FROM NFCPROF F JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM CK ON F.PROF_ID = CK.PROF_ID WHERE F.STATUS='1' AND F.DATES <= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND F.DATEE >= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
and CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID#
and F.PROF_ID=#PROF_ID#
ORDER BY F.PROF_ID, CK.SEQ

SELECT C.SEQ, C.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID ITEM_ID, C.ITEM_NAME, CASE WHEN C.START_TIME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(C.START_TIME,1,2) || ':' || SUBSTR(C.START_TIME,3) END START_TIME, CASE WHEN C.END_TIME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE SUBSTR(C.END_TIME,1,2) || ':' || SUBSTR(C.END_TIME,3) END END_TIME FROM NFCPROF B JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM C ON B.PROF_ID=C.PROF_ID WHERE B.STATUS='1' AND B.DATES <= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND B.DATEE >= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND B.PROF_ID=#PROF_ID# ORDER BY C.SEQ

SELECT TS.NAMELIST_ID as ID, TS.NAME AS CNAME, TP.PNAME PROF_NAME, TO_CHAR(to_date(CKOK.DATETIME, 'yyyyMMddHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DATETIME FROM NAMELIST TS JOIN NFCPROF TP ON TS.PROF_ID=TP.PROF_ID JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM CK ON CK.PROF_ID=TP.PROF_ID LEFT JOIN CHECKIN CKOK ON CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=CKOK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID AND CKOK.NAMELIST_ID=TS.NAMELIST_ID WHERE 1=1 AND TP.DATES <= to_char( sysdate,'yyyymmdd') AND TP.DATEE >= to_char( sysdate,'yyyymmdd') AND TS.NFC_ID=#CARDNO# AND CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID#
SELECT PROF_ID, PNAME NAME FROM NFCPROF F WHERE F.STATUS='1' AND F.DATES <= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND F.DATEE >= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ORDER BY DATES
SELECT A.NAMELIST_ID as ID, A.NAME, A.IDNO, A.MOTEL MOBILE, A.NFC_ID FROM NAMELIST A JOIN NFCPROF B ON A.PROF_ID=B.PROF_ID WHERE 1=1 AND B.STATUS='1' AND B.PROF_ID = #PROF_ID# ORDER BY A.NAMELIST_ID

SELECT DISTINCT STAFF.NAMELIST_ID, '/Share/Photo/ShowAppPhoto' || CHR(63) || 'CODE=' || TO_CHAR((TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(STAFF.IDNO,-4))+7138)*88) || CHR(38) || 'motel=' || REPLACE(STAFF.MOTEL,'-','') PHOTO, STAFF.NAME, STAFF.ID, STAFF.MOTEL PHONE, PROF.DATES, PROF.DATEE, case when ITEM.START_TIME is null then '' else substr(ITEM.START_TIME,1,2) || ':' || substr(ITEM.START_TIME,3,2) end START_TIME, case when ITEM.END_TIME is null then '' else substr(ITEM.END_TIME,1,2) || ':' || substr(ITEM.END_TIME,3,2) end END_TIME, CASE WHEN CKIN.DATETIME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CKIN.DATETIME, 'YYYYMMddHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') END DATETIME
FROM NFCPROF PROF JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM ITEM ON PROF.PROF_ID=ITEM.PROF_ID JOIN NAMELIST STAFF ON PROF.PROF_ID=STAFF.PROF_ID LEFT JOIN CHECKIN CKIN ON ITEM.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=CKIN.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID AND STAFF.NAMELIST_ID=CKIN.NAMELIST_ID /*AND CKIN.CHECKIN_DATE=#CHECKIN_DATE#*/ WHERE 1=1 AND PROF.DATES <= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND PROF.DATEE >= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND PROF.PROF_ID=#PROF_ID# AND ITEM.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#ITEM_ID# AND STAFF.NFC_ID=#NFC_ID#

SELECT DISTINCT CKIN.DATETIME FROM NFCPROF PROF JOIN NAMELIST STAFF ON PROF.PROF_ID=STAFF.PROF_ID JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM ITEM ON PROF.PROF_ID=ITEM.PROF_ID LEFT JOIN CHECKIN CKIN ON ITEM.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=CKIN.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID AND STAFF.NAMELIST_ID=CKIN.NAMELIST_ID /*AND CHECKIN_DATE=#CHECKIN_DATE#*/ WHERE 1=1 AND STAFF.NAMELIST_ID=#NAMELIST_ID# AND ITEM.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID#
AND STAFF.NFC_ID=#NFC_ID#

SELECT STAFF.NAMELIST_ID, '/Share/Photo/ShowAppPhoto' || CHR(63) || 'CODE=' || TO_CHAR((TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(STAFF.IDNO,-4))+7138)*88) || chr(38) || 'motel=' || REPLACE(STAFF.MOTEL,'-','') PHOTO, STAFF.NAME, STAFF.ID, STAFF.MOTEL PHONE, CASE WHEN CKIN.CKIN.DATETIME IS NULL THEN '' ELSE to_char(TO_DATE(CKIN.CKIN.DATETIME, 'yyyyMMddHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') END DATETIME FROM NFCPROF PROF JOIN NAMELIST STAFF ON PROF.PROF_ID=STAFF.PROF_ID JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM ITEM ON PROF.PROF_ID=ITEM.PROF_ID LEFT JOIN CHECKIN CKIN ON ITEM.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=CKIN.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID AND STAFF.NAMELIST_ID=CKIN.NAMELIST_ID /*AND CKIN.CHECKIN_DATE=#CHECKIN_DATE#*/ WHERE 1=1 AND PROF.PROF_ID=#PROF_ID# AND ITEM.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID# ORDER BY STAFF.ID

SELECT T.TESDIR, TS.NAMELIST_ID, CKOK.DATETIME, CK.START_TIME, CK.END_TIME, CASE WHEN T.TES_START_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(T.TES_START_DATE,1,3) + 1911 || SUBSTR(T.TES_START_DATE,4,2) || SUBSTR(T.TES_START_DATE,6,2) ELSE '' END TES_START_DATE_AD, CASE WHEN T.TES_END_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(T.TES_END_DATE,1,3) + 1911 || SUBSTR(T.TES_END_DATE,4,2) || SUBSTR(T.TES_END_DATE,6,2) ELSE '' END TES_END_DATE_AD FROM NAMELIST TS JOIN NFCPROF TP ON TS.DIR=TP.DIR AND TS.EXPIRE=TP.EXPIRE AND TS.PID=TP.PID JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM CK ON CK.PROF_ID=TP.PROF_ID JOIN TES_PARM T ON T.TESDIR=TP.DIR AND T.TESEXPIRE =TP.EXPIRE LEFT JOIN CHECKIN CKOK ON CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID = CKOK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID AND (TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY'))-1911 || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'MMDD'))=SUBSTR(CKOK.DATETIME,1,7) WHERE 1=1 AND TS.NFC_ID=#CARDNO# AND CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID# AND TES_START_DATE <= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') - 19110000 AND TES_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR( SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') - 19110000

SELECT A.ID, B.SHOULD_NUM, C.REAL_NUM, A.PHOTO, A.CNAME, TO_CHAR(TO_AD_DATETIME(A.CDATETIME),'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:mi:ss') CDATETIME FROM ( SELECT T.ID, '/Share/Photo/ShowAppPhoto' || CHR(63) || 'CODE=' || TO_CHAR((TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(IDNO,-4))+7138)*88) || '&motel=' || REPLACE(MOTEL,'-','') PHOTO, T.NAME AS CNAME, OK.DATETIME AS CDATETIME FROM NFCPROF F JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM CK ON F.PROF_ID=CK.PROF_ID JOIN NAMELIST T ON F.DIR = T.DIR AND F.EXPIRE=T.EXPIRE AND F.PID = T.PID LEFT JOIN CHECKIN OK ON OK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID AND OK.NAMELIST_ID=T.NAMELIST_ID
WHERE CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID# ORDER BY F.PROF_ID,CK.SEQ ) A JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS SHOULD_NUM FROM NFCPROF F JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM CK ON F.PROF_ID = CK.PROF_ID JOIN NAMELIST T ON F.DIR = T.DIR AND F.EXPIRE=T.EXPIRE AND F.PID = T.PID WHERE CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID# ORDER BY F.PROF_ID,CK.SEQ ) B ON 1=1 JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS REAL_NUM FROM NFCPROF F JOIN CHECKIN_ITEM CK ON F.PROF_ID = CK.PROF_ID JOIN NAMELIST T ON F.DIR = T.DIR AND F.EXPIRE=T.EXPIRE AND F.PID = T.PID JOIN CHECKIN OK ON OK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID AND OK.NAMELIST_ID=T.NAMELIST_ID WHERE CK.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID#
ORDER BY F.PROF_ID,CK.SEQ ) C ON 1=1

select m.tesexpire as EXPIRE,m.testit as TESTIT,f.pid as PID ,f.pname as PID_NAME, f.prof_id as PROF_ID, t.NAMELIST_ID,t.ID ,t.NAME as CNAME , '/Share/Photo/ShowAppPhoto' || CHR(63) || 'CODE=' || TO_CHAR((TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(t.IDNO,-4))+7138)*88) || '&motel=' || REPLACE(motel,'-','') PHOTO, ''as CHECKINCK ,'$TITLE$' AS TITLE, $CODE$ AS CODE from NAMELIST t join NFCPROF f on t.dir=f.dir and t.expire =f.expire and t.pid = f.pid join tes_parm m on m.tesdir = f.dir and m.tesexpire = f.expire join APP_MOBILE_IMEI i on f.prof_id= i.prof_id join TES_STAFFING s on i.prof_id = s.prof_id and i.idno = s.idno where i.START_DATE <= (to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmdd') - 19110000) and i.END_DATE >= (to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmdd') - 19110000) and i.CHK_STATUS='Y' and i.SYS_STATUS is null and i.user_id= #USER_ID# and i.MOBILE_IMEI= #MOBILE_IMEI#

select P.SYS_PROF_ID PROF_ID, /*報到場次ID(所屬系統場次代碼)*/ P.PNAME, /*報到場次名稱*/ I.SYS_ITEM_ID CHECKIN_ITEM_ID, /*報到項目ID(所屬系統報到項目代碼)*/ I.ITEM_NAME as CHECK_ITEM_NAME, /*報到項目名稱*/ N.NAMELIST_ID, /*報到名單ID*/ N.IDNO, /*報到人員身份證*/ N.NAME, /*報到人員姓名*/ N.NFC_ID, /*報到人員綁定的NFC卡號*/ C.CHECKIN_TYPE, /*報到類型【A.RFID報到, B.人工報到, C.取消報到】*/ C.DATETIME /*報到時間 yyyyMMddHH24MISS*/ from NFC.CHECKIN C join NFC.NAMELIST N On N.NAMELIST_ID=C.NAMELIST_ID join NFC.CHECKIN_ITEM I ON I.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID=C.CHECKIN_ITEM_ID join NFC.NFCPROF P ON P.PROF_ID=I.PROF_ID where P.SYS_ID=#SYS_ID# and P.SYS_PROF_ID=#PROF_ID#
and I.SYS_ITEM_ID=#CHECKIN_ITEM_ID#
order by P.SYS_PROF_ID, I.SYS_ITEM_ID, N.NAMELIST_ID, N.IDNO
